creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
frei0r has three filters that require multimedia/gavl. None of the filters are critical to each other. I don't have any data on who uses which filters, though. I have taken maintainership of multimedia/gavl; I don't see any point in getting rid of it just because it is old.

multimedia/gmerlin is a leaf. If you want to put it up for deprecation, that's up to you.
